omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • We, or third-party data processors acting on our behalf, use the Personal Information we collect from you in the following ways: To provide, develop, maintain, tailor and improve the Cookpad Service and any other services that we operate For example, we might use your Personal Information to: • verify your identity; • allow access to the Site and App; • facilitate the access and amendment of registration information; • store information about preferences; • customise the content on the Site and App in order to provide a more suitable, enriching and improved user experience for you, including the online advertising displayed on the Cookpad Service; • enable users to participate in competitions and promotions; • transmit notices relating to the Cookpad Service and deliver prizes and products to you; and • ensure security of the Site and App.

• We, or third-party data processors acting on our behalf, use the Personal Information we collect from you in the following ways: To provide, develop, maintain, tailor and improve the Cookpad Service and any other services that we operate For example, we might use your Personal Information to: • verify your identity; • allow access to the Site and App; • facilitate the access and amendment of registration information; • store information about preferences; • customise the content on the Site and App in order to provide a more suitable, enriching and improved user experience for you, including the online advertising displayed on the Cookpad Service; • enable users to participate in competitions and promotions; • transmit notices relating to the Cookpad Service and deliver prizes and products to you; and • ensure security of the Site and App.
